responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete the IVX IA chat module end-to-end: fix all 3 FAILs and close all 22 UNVERIFIED audit items, deploy fixes, rerun audit until `IVX_IA_CHAT_SENIOR_DEVELOPER_VERIFIED_COMPLETE`

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform (Swift project origin)
- User explicitly rejected creating a separate web preview app
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `api.ivxholding.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- User demands: no raw stack traces in UI, structured server-side logging, real test proof
- User demands: all 60 audit items must PASS with live evidence â€” no UNVERIFIED, no FAIL
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key â€” only Vercel access
- User has limited patience for repeated manual dashboard steps â€” wants this finished now
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift â€” cannot preview React Native app from sandbox

## Progress
### Done
- **AI Gateway key fix DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE**:
  - Render API key provided: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` (35 chars, verified working)
  - `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` set via Render API `PUT /v1/services/srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0/env-vars/AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` â†’ HTTP 200
  - Deploy `dep-d98hh3mrnols73fb6fag` triggered via API â†’ status `live`, bootTime `2026-07-10T16:07:47.292Z`
  - Production chat returns `source: "chatgpt"`, `model: "openai/gpt-4o"` â€” real AI answers, no more fallback
  - Vercel gateway `total_used` incremented: 82.6907 â†’ 82.6939 â†’ 82.7009 â€” backend confirmed using new key
  - Gateway balance: $422.30
- **Full senior developer audit executed (60 items)**: 35 PASS, 3 FAIL, 22 UNVERIFIED
- **Persistence proven through real backend restart**: Render restart API called, bootTime changed, message IDs `public-chat-message-ea72a942-...` and `public-chat-message-6c8a494b-...` survived restart, chat still `source: chatgpt` after restart
- **Security probes PASSED**: prompt injection refused (no key leak), unauthenticated sensitive request â†’ 401, rate limiting active (remaining: 19)
- **Local tests PASS**: 13/13 (version-endpoint, public-chat-ai, verify-live-commit-match), full suite 787/789
- **Render capabilities proven live**: deploy trigger, log reading, deploy status, rollback list (3 deploys visible)
- **Socket.IO realtime fix WRITTEN AND TESTED LOCALLY**:
  - New file `backend/chat-realtime.ts`: `attachChatRealtime(httpServer)` mounts Socket.IO on the production Hono HTTP server
  - `server.ts` updated: imports `attachChatRealtime`, mounts on served HTTP server, adds SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown handlers
  - Local test PASSED: handshake HTTP 200 (was 404 in prod), `chat:welcome` â†’ `room:join` â†’ `room:joined` â†’ `chat:send` â†’ `chat:message` (user broadcast) â†’ `chat:message` (assistant broadcast) â€” full round trip with real AI reply
  - TypeScript: 0 errors in changed files (`chat-realtime.ts`, `server.ts`); pre-existing expo module errors unaffected
- **Prior completed work still valid**:
  - Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components
  - Render repo repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`; commit `dcbf86fa` matches across GitHub/Render/health/version
  - Owner auth verified live: diagnostic â†’ 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected; bad-creds â†’ 401
  - Enterprise guard bug found and fixed locally (28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts`)
  - 4-file AI resilience fix written locally (provider fallback, error sanitization, owner variable hydration)
  - Cloudflare Worker at `ivx26-backend.rork.app` â€” codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1`
  - Expo SDK 54.0.35, `bun install` 1028 packages, `expo-doctor` passed, Metro bundler clean
  - New AI Gateway key created via Vercel API: `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`
  - Dead key identified: `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ`
  - Root cause was: key pasted into Render Secret Files instead of Environment Variables

### In Progress
- Closing all 22 UNVERIFIED + 3 FAIL audit items end to end
- Realtime fix (`backend/chat-realtime.ts` + `server.ts`) ready but NOT deployed â€” needs GitHub push â†’ Render auto-deploy
- 4-file AI resilience fix (provider fallback, error sanitization) also local only â€” needs deploy

### Blocked
- **No GitHub push token in environment**: worker env-check shows `githubToken present: false`; cannot push code to GitHub â†’ cannot trigger Render auto-deploy of local fixes
- **22 UNVERIFIED items require device-level testing**: UI interactions (keyboard, composer, scroll, typing indicator), multi-device sync (Android/iOS/Web), offline queue, file uploads â€” cannot run React Native app from this Swift sandbox
- **Multi-file chat memory/RAG not wired**: `backend/hono.ts:1120` self-reports "multi-file chat memory/RAG is not fully wired"
- **Render API key exposed in chat**: user pasted `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` in plain text â€” should be revoked and replaced after work completes
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed no OpenAI key â€” direct OpenAI fallback cannot be configured

## Key Decisions
- Vercel AI Gateway KEPT â€” user has $422 credits and working key; direct provider routing not viable without OpenAI/Anthropic keys
- Socket.IO mounted on production Hono server via `attachChatRealtime()` in `server.ts` â€” shares one process, one port, one message store with REST API
- Realtime protocol matches Expo client (`expo/lib/chat-room-client.ts`): `chat:welcome`, `room:join` â†’ `room:joined`/`room:state`, `chat:send` â†’ `chat:message` broadcast + AI assistant reply
- `auth` failures are retryable across providers â€” dead gateway key fails over when direct keys configured
- Raw provider errors NEVER sent to UI â€” full diagnostics stay server-side only
- Runtime key hydration from Owner Variables store added â€” key rotation takes effect without Render redeploy (60s TTL cache)
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers

## Next Steps
- **Obtain GitHub push token** (user provides via secure widget) â†’ push realtime fix + 4-file AI resilience fix + enterprise guard fix to GitHub â†’ Render auto-deploys
- **After deploy, rerun audit item #26**: `GET /socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling` should return HTTP 200 (was 404)
- **After deploy, rerun audit items #18-20**: provider fallback and sanitized errors now deployed
- **Close device-level UNVERIFIED items**: either user runs app on device and reports, or find a way to verify from sandbox
- **Wire multi-file chat memory/RAG** or document it as out of scope for this audit
- **Rerun full 60-item audit** after all fixes deployed â†’ target `IVX_IA_CHAT_SENIOR_DEVELOPER_VERIFIED_COMPLETE`
- **Revoke exposed Render API key** after work complete

## Critical Context
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Render service URL: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Render API key: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` (verified working, exposed in chat)
- Latest deploy: `dep-d98hh3mrnols73fb6fag` â€” live, commit `dcbf86fa`
- Previous deploys available for rollback: `dep-d98h1858nd3s73cbmj00`, `dep-d98di0beo5us73dbaoo0` (both deactivated, same commit)
- Production bootTime: `2026-07-10T16:07:47.292Z` (from key-fix deploy; was `15:33:55Z` before)
- GitHub HEAD: `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` â€” matches live Render
- Working AI Gateway key: `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6` â€” $422.30 balance
- Dead AI Gateway key: `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ`
- User's Vercel account token: `vcp_1UWzfu1up7xx9gRXsSZxjAsNzYdzcIEXUuf4wUPfpQCyCjPYOX1hjUKO`
- Vercel team ID: `team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji`; user: `osconstructors@gmail.com`; plan: `hobby`
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- Cloudflare Worker: `ivx26-backend.rork.app`, codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1`
- Local server test: `PORT=3123 bunx tsx server.ts` â†’ health 200, socket.io handshake 200, full realtime round trip verified
- Backend has NO `/etc/secrets` references â€” Secret Files on Render are never read by the app
- `backend/hono.ts:1120`: self-reports "multi-file chat memory/RAG is not fully wired"
- Socket.IO was 404 in prod because `server.ts` used `@hono/node-server` `serve()` which only exposes the Hono fetch handler, not the raw HTTP server needed for Socket.IO â€” fixed by capturing the returned server instance and passing it to `attachChatRealtime()`

## Relevant Files
- `backend/chat-realtime.ts`: NEW â€” Socket.IO realtime layer for production Hono server; `attachChatRealtime(httpServer)` mounts chat protocol
- `server.ts`: MODIFIED â€” imports `attachChatRealtime`, captures `serve()` return as HTTP server, mounts Socket.IO, adds shutdown handlers
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: AI runtime; gateway key hydration + fallback chain entry point; `hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()` with 60s TTL cache
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: provider fallback logic; `auth` failures now retryable; chain: `vercel_ai_gateway` â†’ `openai_direct` â†’ `anthropic_direct`
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: chat API; error sanitization for UI; `visibleAnswer` is canned string, `providerError` has no stack/message
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: fallback trigger list includes `'auth'`
- `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts`: 28 enterprise guard handlers fixed locally with `requireEnterpriseOwner` async helper
- `backend/express-chat-server.ts`: original Express+Socket.IO chat server (reference implementation, not used in production)
- `expo/lib/chat-room-client.ts`: Expo client Socket.IO protocol â€” `createChatSocket()`, `sendChatMessage()`, `fetchChatRoomState()`
- `backend/hono.ts`: main production API; lines 3596-3606 register public chat REST routes; line 1120 self-reports multi-file RAG not wired
- `backend/chat-storage.ts`: SQLite-based chat message storage with `createMessage()`, `listMessages()`
- `backend/public-chat-supabase-store.ts`: Supabase persistence for public chat sessions and messages
- `functions/index.ts`: Cloudflare Worker deploy bridge; env-check, gateway-test, render-test actions
